blocks.text: Carlsen's World Championship campaign opens Wednesday — brace yourselves
The FIDE Candidates crowns the next World Chess Championship challenger. For Carlsen, nothing matters more this year. Round 1 fires at 16:00 Wednesday — the biggest chess moment since his comeback.
♟️ Wed 16:00 — FIDE Candidates Round 1: Carlsen opens his World Championship bid
🎾 Sun 06:00 — Monte-Carlo Masters: clay season's first major, world's best on red dirt
🎮 Mon 02:00 — CS2 Major Bucharest: rain (Håvard Nygaard) enters the biggest event of 2026
